title: Corrective fix for B0031-review: Review Implement TUI data model and panel formatting
description:
Blocked reason: Review reported unresolved findings in remaining.

Remaining work: No correctness, coverage, or documentation gaps were identified in the reviewed scope.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0031-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py to treat explicit no-gap review wording as benign remaining text, and added a regression test in tests/test_orchestrator.py covering the exact phrase that triggered this corrective bead. Targeted validation passed with `python -m unittest` for the affected scheduler/review cases.
handoff_summary.risks: Remaining-work classification is still phrase-based. Future review/test wording that means 'no follow-up' but uses materially different language may need another benign phrase added.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry the parent review bead so it can complete against the corrected remaining-text classifier.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Downstream scheduler work should preserve the distinction between unresolved findings and explicitly no-gap review/test summaries; changes to the remaining-text heuristic should keep this regression covered.

conflict_risks: Downstream scheduler work should preserve the distinction between unresolved findings and explicitly no-gap review/test summaries; changes to the remaining-text heuristic should keep this regression covered.

execution_history.summary: Adjusted review/test remaining-work classification so explicit no-gap review wording no longer forces a false blocked state, and added regression coverage.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run targeted validation needed to confirm the implementation.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
